title: Egyptian Flatbread Casserole
description: A delicious and healthy Egyptian-inspired casserole made with flatbread, cassava, and other flavorful ingredients. Perfect for a quick and satisfying meal.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine crushed flatbread, diced cassava, chopped rosy, and chopped chewy.
Mix well until all ingredients are evenly combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the casserole is golden brown and crispy on top.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
